SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JULIO BOLIVAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CENTRAL CLEANERS IS PRESENT APPEARING IN COURT IS JAMES REN. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOLIVAR, JULIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CENTRAL CLEANERS $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $275.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
